itemLocation.linkage: file://\\srv-sbs\publica\GABINETE DE APOIO E GESTÃO DE PROJECTOS E FISCALIZAÇÃO\SIG2017\Infrasig\InfraSIG101shemaETRS89.gdb

lineage.Process: CalculateField "Tubagens - Distribuicao" IDEntidade ""aTU" & [OBJECTID] & Mid( now,9,2) & Mid( now,4,2 ) & Left( now,2)" VB #

dataIdInfo.envirDesc: Microsoft Windows 7 Version 6.1 (Build 7601) Service Pack 1; Esri ArcGIS 10.4.1.5686

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Length of feature in internal units.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.

stflddd.domdesc: Intervalo de valores possiveis para o ano
